title: Grilled Skewers with Roasted Pepper Sauce
description: A flavorful dish that combines the smoky taste of grilled meat with the sweetness of roasted peppers. Perfect for a summer evening.
instructions: Thread chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a small bowl, mix together minced garlic, roasted peppers, and olive oil.
Brush the garlic-pepper mixture onto both sides of the chicken.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with additional roasted peppers if desired.
